de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification

Class AbandonNotification

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification.NotificationTask
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification.AbandonNotification

  • public class AbandonNotification
extends NotificationTask
    Notifies the user when a proof task is abandoned.
